    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractDataRetrievalService
    All methods for retrieving the data required for the Corona dashboard from any supported server.
    AbstractRestConfiguration
    Base class for all rest configurations that may be used in this project.
    AbstractRestConfiguration.TokenBasedAuth
     
    AcribisChecks
     
    AcribisCohortIcdCodes
     
    AcribisCohortOpsCodes
     
    AcribisCurrentDischargeDiags
    Creation of the "timeline.diags.occurrence" items for kjp and rsv.
    AcribisDataController
     
    AcribisDataItemGenerator
    Class in which the individual DataItems of the json specification with acribis context are generated.
    AcribisDataItemTests
     
    AcribisTimelineDischargeDiags
    Creation of the "dischargediags.cohorts" items for acribis.
    AcuwaveDataRetrievalService
    All methods to retrieve the data necessary for the corona dashboard from an Acuwave server.
    AcuwaveDataSourceType
    Enum class with all supported acuwave data source types.
    AcuwaveQuerySuffixBuilder
    Building the templates of the individual REST requests to the Acuwaveles server.
    AcuwaveSearchConfiguration
    This class is used to parameterize the Search queries at the local Acuwave server of the data providers.
    AcuwaveSearchService
    Service for providing the AcuwaveServerRestConfiguration (e.g.
    AcuwaveServerRestConfiguration
    This class is used to read out the individual configuration of the Acuwave servers of the data providers.
    AggregatedDataItem
    Model class that describes a single data item of the Corona Dashboard specification and provides a representation in a json string.
    BctDataController
     
    BctDataItemGenerator
    Class in which the individual DataItems of the JSON specification with bct context are generated.
    BctDataItemTests
     
    BctModuleRule
    A BCT module assignment happens via l1 code or a combination of (multiple) l2 codes
    CaseIdentifierValueProvider
     
    CaseIdProvider
     
    ChartListItem
     
    CodeUtils
     
    CohortLogic
     
    Compare
     
    ConfigurationTransformer
    Class that reads individually configurable terminology codes from YAML and converts them into required formats and data types for data queries and data processing.
    ConfigurationTransformer.ConfigurationContext
    Some parts of the local configuration require individual handling in the reading and evaluation process.
    ConsentCategory
     
    ConsentFixedValues
     
    CoreBaseDataItem
     
    CoreCaseData
     
    CoreCaseData.AdmissionStatus
     
    CoronaResultFunctionality
    This class contains all the functions that could be important in several of the sub-logics (current, cumulative and temporal)
    CoronaResultFunctionalityTests
     
    CoronaTreatmentLevelExport
    Export model for file generation that reports case/encounter ids of active cases separated by treatment level.
    CovidDataController
     
    CovidDataItemTests
     
    CovidInfluenzaDataItemTests
    Tests that are used for covid and influenza items
    CsvGenerator
     
    CumulativeAge
    This class is used for generating the data items cumulative.age including the subitems (*.alive, *.dead).
    CumulativeGender
    This class is used for generating the data item cumulative.gender.
    CumulativeGenderByClass
    This class is used for generating the data items cumulative.inpatient.gender and cumulative.outpatient.gender.
    CumulativeLengthOfStayHospital
    This class is used for generating the data items cumulative.lengthofstay.hospital and the subitems.
    CumulativeLengthOfStayIcu
    This class is used for generating the data items cumulative.lengthofstay.icu and the subitems.
    CumulativeLengthOfStayIcuTests
     
    CumulativeMaxTreatmentLevel
    This class is used for generating the data item cumulative.maxtreatmentlevel
    CumulativeMaxTreatmentLevelAge
    This class is used for generating the data item cumulative.maxtreatmentlevel.age.* subitems
    CumulativeRenalReplacementData
     
    CumulativeRenalReplacementRiskROC
     
    CumulativeRenalReplacementRiskROCThread
     
    CumulativeResult
    This class is used for generating the data item cumulative.result.
    CumulativeResultTests
     
    CumulativeVariantTestResults
    This class is used for generating the data item cumulative.varianttestresults.
    CumulativeZipCode
    This class is used for generating the data item cumulative.zipcode.
    CumulativeZipCodeTests
     
    CurrentConsent
    This class is used for generating the data item bct.current.consent.
    CurrentMaxTreatmentLevel
    This class is used for generating the data item current.maxtreatmentlevel.
    CurrentMaxTreatmentLevelAge
    This class is used for generating the data item current.maxtreatmentlevel.age.* with subitems like *.normal_ward and *.age.icu.
    CurrentRecruitment
    This class is used for generating the data item acr.current.recruitment.
    CurrentRenalReplacementRisk
     
    CurrentTreatmentLevel
    This class is used for generating the data item current.treatmentlevel.
    CurrentZipCode
    This class is used for generating the data item cumulative.zipcode.
    CustomGlobalConfiguration
     
    CustomPair<L,R>
     
    DashboardApplication
    The base class of the NUM Dashboard project with the main method.
    DashboardData
     
    DashboardDataItemLogic
     
    DashboardLogicFixedValues
    Class with all textual fixed values necessary for the creation of the Json class and data processing (e.g.
    DataBuilder
     
    DataItemContext
     
    DataItemGenerator
    Class in which the individual DataItems of the Json specification are generated.
    DataItems
    Class with constant's names for the different data items
    DataItemsConfiguration
    This class is used to parameterize an exclusion of data items of the JSON specification on request.
    DataItemTests
     
    DataItemTypes
    Class with all the possible types of the different data items
    DataRetrievalController
    Controller class for the "/createJson" REST endpoint with the main method to create the Json specification for the Corona Dashboard.
    DataRetrievalService
    This interface provides all the retrieval methods needed to supply the corona dashboard with the necessary data, regardless of the server type.
    DataSourceType
    Enum class with all supported acuwave data source types.
    DateHelper
     
    DateTools
    Auxiliary class, with various tools to convert / create date fields.
    DiseaseDataItem
    Model class that describes a single data item of the Corona Dashboard specification and provides a representation in a json string.
    DiseaseDetectionManagement
    Class predominantly used for annotation and detection of cases/patients as SARS-CoV-2 / influenza positive
    DiseaseResultFunctionality
    This class contains all the functions that are used in different disease context.

    EncounterExampleData
     
    EncounterFilter

    This class is used to parameterize the FHIR Search queries at the local FHIR server of the data providers.

    FhirServerQuerySuffixBuilder

    KiraInteger
    The Value of a kiradar entry that should get replaced by an inequality string if it's lower than a given threshold.
    KiRaKjpDataItemGenerator
    Class in which the individual DataItems of the json specification with kids radar context are generated.
    KiraKjpTimelineAdmission
    This class is used for generating the data items containing admission timelines.
    KiraKjpTimelineAge
    This class is used for generating the data items containing age timelines.
    KiraKjpTimelineIntensiveCare
    This class is used for generating the data items containing kiradar kjp timelines.
    KiraLengthOfStay
    Generation of the 'cumulative.diags.lengthofstay' items for kjp and rsv.
    KiraMonthAgg
    Small typed aggregator for per-month counters.
    KiRaPedDataItemGenerator
    Class in which the individual DataItems of the json specification with kids radar context are generated.
    KiraPedTimelineAge
    This class is used for generating the data items containing age timelines.
    KiraPedTimelineMaxTreatmentLevel
    This class is used for generating the data item kira.pedriatric.timeline.maxtreatmentlevel.
    KiraTimelineDisorders
    Generates the grouped bar chart data item for the KidsRadar timeline, used to visualize diagnostic group occurrences across monthly periods.

    Class with auxiliary methods for list operations.

    Various auxiliary methods that affect the location resources.

    This class is used for generating the data item timeline.deaths.

    This class contains some auxiliary functions that are used in the logic of the timelines.

    This class is used for generating the data item timeline.maxtreatmentlevel.

    This class is used for generating the data item acr.timeline.recruitment.

    TimerTools
    Utility class for functions concerning time measurements
    TimestampedListPair
    A map that connects two lists with a derivation of type Number.

    A map that connects two lists with a derivation of type Number.

    Custom exception for token refresh errors.
    TreatmentLevels
     
    TreatmentLevels.Pediatric
    Pediatric treatment levels with specific order of severity.
    UkbModelController
     
    ValueOperations
    Class for all value determination operations necessary for the applications of the model formula.
    VariantConfiguration
    Class for customizing the covid variant counting method, for example adding new variants via display name.
    VariantSettings
    Configuration class to dynamically respond to emerging covid variants.
    VitalStatus
    Enum class containing the different VitalStatus states
